description: Create a standard 3-view orthographic drawing (Front, Top, and Right Side) of a V-Block fixture in LibreCAD using Inch units. The part dimensions are 3.00" Length (depth) x 2.50" Width x 2.00" Height. The Front View shows the 2.50" x 2.00" face with the V-profile visible; the Top View shows the 2.50" x 3.00" face; and the Right Side View shows the 3.00" x 2.00" face. The V-Groove is centered on the top face with a 90-degree included angle and 1.00" vertical depth. Side slots on the left and right vertical faces are 0.50" wide x 0.25" deep, running the entire length and centered vertically at Y=1.00". The drawing must be at 1:1 scale and utilize three layers: 'VISIBLE' (White/Black), 'HIDDEN' (Blue, Dashed linetype), and 'DIMENSIONS' (Red). Ensure invisible features, such as the V-groove bottom in the side view and slots in the top view, are placed on the 'HIDDEN' layer. Include at least three main dimensions and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/vblock_projection.dxf.
